user_task_description: This report is out of order and needs a constrained executive summary at the front.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Reorder the document so it reads `Executive Summary -> Findings -> Next Steps -> Appendix Materials`, then place exactly three short summary lines directly under `Executive Summary` using the prefixes `Permit:`, `Supplier:`, and `Safety:` in that order.
atomic_scope: Only the section reorder and one-paragraph executive summary generation are explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document with the requested section order and one grounded summary paragraph.

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Existing theme and typography issues are outside scope
- Do not generate more than one summary paragraph
